title: 8 Herbal Tinctures for Overweight Individuals with Hiatus Hernia
description: Zanthoxylum bungeanum tinctures may help alleviate symptoms associated with hiatus hernia due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant contains constituents such as volatile oils, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues.
